Enter your Agency Token and Company ID. The Company ID is in the URL when opening your Private Integration: settings/private-integrations/COMPANY_ID

Sub-Accounts

0 selected
Click a sub-account to select it. Click Connect to add its token. Tokens are saved automatically.
Accounts Library
Edit all account-level connections in one place. This general library keeps the token, domain, Acuity value, and comma-separated calendar IDs for every sub-account without removing the individual actions below.
Connect the agency first to load all sub-accounts into the general library.
Connect agency first

New Patient Link
